AI.title: A startup claims it broke through a bottleneck that’s holding back LLMs
AI.summary: Miami-based AI startup Subquadratic came out of stealth mode last month with a huge claim. It announced that it had solved a mathematical bottleneck that had been holding back large language models for almost a decade. The details were thin, and many people were unconvinced. AI.title: Brain-computer interface trials are taking off
AI.summary: This week, I covered the story of Casey Harrell—a man with ALS who is “the first power user” of a brain implant, according to the researchers who worked with him.
